hero.title: Join ECAA
hero.description: Join the Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta and help strengthen Ethiopian community life, cultural connection, mutual support, and intergenerational resilience.

benefitsSection.label: Membership Details
benefitsSection.title: Membership benefits
benefitsSection.description: Membership helps support ECAA's community programs, cultural activities, leadership work, and services for Ethiopians and Ethiopian-Americans in the Atlanta area.
items: Stay connected with ECAA announcements and events
Participate in community decision-making where eligible
Help preserve Ethiopian culture and heritage
Support youth, families, elders, and intergenerational programs
Contribute to EDIR and mutual-support efforts where applicable

membershipOption.title: ECAA Membership
membershipOption.subtitle: Standard membership with the Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta.
membershipOption.feeNote: Please contact ECAA or use the official membership form for the most current membership dues.
membershipOption.description: Membership is intended for Ethiopian community members, Ethiopian-Americans, families, and supporters connected to ECAA's mission.

beforeYouStart.label: Prepare
beforeYouStart.title: What You Need Before You Start
beforeYouStart.description: Gather this information before completing the registration form. It helps the process go smoothly.

registration.label: Register
registration.title: Membership Registration
registration.description: Complete your ECAA membership registration and payment through the secure Jotform linked below.
registration.ctaDescription: Membership registration and payment are handled securely through Jotform. The form opens in a new tab.
registration.importantNote: The form may ask for family, spouse, children, designated representative, disclosure, and signature information depending on membership type.

relatedLinks.title: Explore More With ECAA
relatedLinks.description: Membership connects you to education, events, volunteering, and community support across Atlanta.

notice.title: Important notice
notice.text: Please read the full disclosure carefully inside the registration form before signing. Specific EDIR fees or requirements should be verified with ECAA before completing registration.

finalCta.title: Ready to join ECAA?
finalCta.description: Start your registration online or contact ECAA if you need help before completing the form.

options.title: ECAA + EDIR Membership
options.summary: Membership that includes ECAA and EDIR participation.
details: EDIR appears as part of ECAA's community structure.
TODO: Add verified EDIR membership fees or requirements before publishing.
Contact ECAA for current EDIR membership guidance.
